title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
snippet: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

title: Anthropic Tops OpenAI to Become the World’s Most Valuable A.I. Start-Up
snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in new fund-raising that put its value at $900 billion, ahead of OpenAI's last valuation of $730 billion, as the companies duel...

title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation in latest round
snippet: Anthropic is now the most valuable AI company in Silicon Valley after a new $65 billion funding round.

title: Anthropic's valuation surges to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI

title: Artificial Intelligence: The Orb, new AI tech by Tools for Humanity, scans your iris to prove user is human
snippet: A biometric device by Tools for Humanity that scans people's irises is being introduced as a way to distinguish humans from bots online.

title: Anthropic Valued at $965 Billion After Latest Funding Round, Eclipsing OpenAI
